heading: Funding
label: 4147 Funding
text: The Secretary shall use not more than $25,000,000 of the amounts made available under for fiscal year 1993, and not more than $25,000,000 of the amounts made available under for fiscal year 1994, to carry out this subchapter. Of any amounts made available to carry out this subchapter in any appropriation Act, 90 percent shall be set aside for use in accordance with and 10 percent shall be set aside for use in accordance with subsection 4144 of this title.section 4124(a) of this titlesection 4124(a) of this titlesection 4143 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1
